title: Walk = Enchant
description: walk and all the items in your inventory get enchanted
body:
This mod **enchants** every item in your inventory with a **unique enchantment** each time you walk a block. When you reach a certain amount of blocks, **fireworks launch into the sky to celebrate your progress.** and it has a nice tooltip message saying **Walk Enchanted** to know its enchanted.
do **/enchant_times** to enchant a certain number of times you cheetah
